message:
fix(runtime): Add PyValue fast paths to builtin call wrappers

Add concrete PyValue-only functions to prevent monomorphization explosion
in builtin call wrappers. Each anytype function now dispatches to a
concrete PyValue version that compiles once.

Changes:
- float_ops/builtins.zig: Add floatBuiltinCallPyValue, boolBuiltinCallPyValue
  with fast path dispatching in floatBuiltinCall/boolBuiltinCall

- int_ops.zig: Add intBuiltinCallPyValue with fast path in intBuiltinCall

- type_builtins.zig: Add boolBuiltinCallPyValue with fast path

- logic_ops.zig: Add pyOrPyValue, pyAndPyValue with fast paths in
  pyOr/pyAnd for when both operands are PyValue

This follows the PyValue-First Architecture pattern established in the
equality.zig fix (commit fae610e2).
